name: systems-thinking-toolkit
description: Systems thinking toolkit grounded in Dennis Sherwood, Seeing the Forest for the Trees (2002). 7 functional skills + 1 router. Carry-1 cld-craft (prose → fully-annotated Mermaid CLD; 12 hygiene rules + Rule 7 fuzzy elevation + R/B classification + Sterman uniflow discipline; v0.8 adds optional CLD falsifiability protocol — 6 falsification tests for high-stakes decisions, the plugin's first methodological improvement over Sherwood Rule 10 social-validation) feeds downstream: cld-archetypes (limits-to-growth + variance/target/action; v0.7 magnitude rule + Branch L disambiguation), cld-overlay (outward stakeholder straddle), team-mental-model (inward convergence + leadership energy proxies), strategy-lever-and-cascade (v0.6 Martian-test perturbation inline; v0.7 STOP rule + HOLD-lever pattern), simulation-modeling (CLD → stock-flow, text-only). Plus V1-weak manager-personality-quadrant. v0.8 adds 2 new cases: Case 11/A4 plugin self-analysis (modern agent-orchestration domain filling Sherwood's pre-2010 blind spot) + Case 12 reductionism-failure meta-case (Sherwood Ch 1-3 pattern; calibration for 'when should I use a CLD at all?'). Distilled via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline. システム思考ツールキット — Sherwood 2002 ベース。系統思考工具組 — Sherwood 2002 為本。
